subcodes.first_line: O thou who art enraptured by the fragrances of the Abhá Kingdom! Happy art thou for this cup that overfloweth with the wine of God's bounty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منجذب بنفحات ملکوت ابهی هنیئا لک هذه الکاس الطافحه بصهباء موهبه الله و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for teaching, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
